data.title: Gathid Software Boosts ARR Amid Ongoing Legal Dispute
data.description:
RightCrowd ( (AU:GTH) ) has issued an announcement.

Gathid Software reported a significant increase in its Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) by 25% in Q3 2025, reaching $1.695 million. This growth is attributed to securing two new customers and expanding existing customer contracts. The company also managed to reduce its net cash outflow due to increased customer receipts. However, Gathid is currently embroiled in a legal dispute with Bloom regarding the sale of its physical security business, with unresolved financial disagreements potentially impacting its financial standing.

More about RightCrowd

Gathid Software Pty Ltd operates in the software industry, focusing on providing SaaS solutions. The company is dedicated to expanding its market presence by increasing its customer base and enhancing its software platform’s capabilities.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.01M

data.title: Emperor Metals Inc. Announces $4.25 Million Private Placement for Exploration
data.description:
Emperor Metals, Inc. ( (TSE:AUOZ) ) has issued an announcement.

Emperor Metals Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement financing to raise up to $4.25 million through the issuance of flow-through common shares. The proceeds will be used for Canadian exploration expenses that qualify as flow-through mining expenditures. This move is expected to bolster Emperor’s exploration activities in Quebec and enhance its positioning in the mining industry. The offering is subject to approval by the Canadian Securities Exchange.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AUOZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AUOZ is a Neutral.

Emperor Metals, Inc. presents a mixed investment case. The company demonstrates strong technical momentum, supported by significant recent gold discoveries, which could enhance its market position. However, persistent financial challenges, including negative cash flows and lack of profitability, weigh heavily on its overall score. The company must address these financial issues to fully capitalize on its exploration successes and improve its valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AUOZ stock, click here.

More about Emperor Metals, Inc.

Emperor Metals Inc. is a junior mining company specializing in high-grade gold exploration and development. The company focuses on Quebec’s Southern Abitibi Greenstone Belt, utilizing AI-driven exploration techniques to unlock resource potential in projects like the Duquesne West Gold Project and the Lac Pelletier Project. Emperor is led by experienced professionals with a history of advancing mining projects from exploration to production.

YTD Price Performance: 78.57%

Average Trading Volume: 245,835

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$15.08M

data.title: Tesoro Gold Announces Proposed Securities Issue to Boost Capital
data.description:
Tesoro Gold ( (AU:TSO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tesoro Gold Ltd has announced a proposed issue of securities, which includes the issuance of 15 million unlisted options and over 461 million ordinary fully paid shares. This move is part of a strategic effort to raise capital and potentially expand its operations, reflecting the company’s ambition to strengthen its position in the gold mining sector. The issuance is scheduled for April 29, 2025, and is expected to impact the company’s financial structure and stakeholder interests.

Tesoro Gold Ltd operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold resources. The company is primarily engaged in identifying and extracting gold deposits, aiming to enhance its market presence and capitalize on the demand for precious metals.

data.title: EBOS Group Expands with Strategic Acquisitions and Share Issue
data.description:
The latest update is out from EBOS Group Limited ( (AU:EBO) ).

EBOS Group Limited has issued 5,926,876 new ordinary shares at a price of NZ$36.65 or A$33.69 per share to fund the acquisition of SVS Veterinary Supplies and a 10% stake in Transmedic Pte Ltd. The capital raised will also enhance EBOS’s balance sheet capacity for future growth opportunities, strengthening its position in the healthcare and animal care industries.

More about EBOS Group Limited

EBOS Group Limited operates in the healthcare and animal care sectors, providing a range of products and services including pharmaceuticals, medical supplies, and veterinary products. The company focuses on expanding its market presence through strategic acquisitions and investments.

data.title: Kingsoft Corporation to Increase Stake in Kingsoft Cloud Through New Share Subscription
data.description:
Kingsoft ( (HK:3888) ) has shared an update.

Kingsoft Corporation Limited announced a Subscription Agreement with Kingsoft Cloud, wherein Kingsoft has agreed to subscribe to new shares at HK$5.83 each. This transaction is classified as a connected transaction due to the involvement of Mr. Jun LEI, a director with significant voting power in Xiaomi, which holds a stake in Kingsoft Cloud. The Subscription will result in Kingsoft acquiring approximately 1.65% of Kingsoft Cloud’s enlarged share capital, subject to certain conditions. This move could strengthen Kingsoft’s position in the cloud services market, potentially impacting its market strategy and stakeholder interests.

More about Kingsoft

Kingsoft Corporation Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability. It operates in the technology industry, focusing on software development and cloud services. Kingsoft Cloud, a subsidiary, is a significant part of its operations, providing cloud services and solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 10.71%

data.title: Casa Minerals Closes Oversubscribed Private Placement to Fund Exploration
data.description:
Casa Minerals ( (TSE:CASA) ) just unveiled an update.

Casa Minerals Inc. announced the successful closing of an oversubscribed non-brokered private placement, raising a total of $738,174.97 through the issuance of 13,421,363 Flow-through Units. The proceeds will be used for exploration and development activities on the company’s projects in British Columbia, Canada. The completion of this private placement is pending approval from the TSX Venture Exchange, and the securities issued will be subject to a hold period in compliance with applicable securities laws.

More about Casa Minerals

Casa Minerals Inc. is involved in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada and the USA. The company holds a 90% interest in the Congress gold mine in Arizona, USA, and a 100% interest in the polymetallic Pitman project in British Columbia, Canada. Additionally, Casa Minerals has an option to acquire a 75% interest in the Arsenault VMS Property in British Columbia.

Current Market Cap: $2.62M

data.title: KKR Credit Income Fund Reports Slight NTA Increase
data.description:
KKR Credit Income fund Units ( (AU:KKC) ) has shared an update.

KKR Credit Income Fund announced a slight increase in its Net Tangible Assets (NTA) per unit, rising from $2.4158 to $2.4227, marking a 0.29% growth as of April 14, 2025. This update, although modest, reflects the fund’s ongoing efforts to enhance value for its stakeholders, despite the inherent uncertainties in financial markets. The figures are unaudited and approximate, highlighting the need for investors to consider this information cautiously.

More about KKR Credit Income fund Units

KKR Credit Income Fund, managed by KKR Australia Investment Management Pty Limited, operates in the financial services industry, focusing on credit income investments. The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited acts as the responsible entity for the fund. The fund is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) and aims to provide investors with income through diversified credit investments.

data.title: Bonjour Holdings Announces Rights Issue and Placing Agreement
data.description:
Bonjour Holdings ( (HK:0653) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bonjour Holdings Limited has announced a proposed rights issue, offering three rights shares for every existing share at a subscription price of HK$0.080, aiming to raise approximately HK$107.45 million. The company has also entered into a placing agreement to handle unsubscribed rights shares, with Mr. Chen, a major shareholder, committing to maintain his stake and ensure compliance with public float requirements. This financial maneuver is expected to bolster the company’s capital structure and potentially impact its market positioning.

More about Bonjour Holdings

Bonjour Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the retail industry with a focus on beauty and health products. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is known for its market presence in Hong Kong and other regions.
